steps.t: The abandoned den should be north of the hunter's lodge near the standing stones. Thrasi hurt his leg while rescuing an injured lynx from hendrevail a…
Coax the lynx-cub from its den. With the hendrevail defeated, the lynx-cub seems to feel safe enough to leave its den.
Thrasi is back at the hunter's lodge, south of here. You recovered the lynx-cub as Thrasi requested. Return it to him at the hunter's lodge.
